final:
// // This module is designed to implement a 1-bit SRAM cell with a write enable and clock inputs, but it actually reads the data on every clock edge regardless of the write enable signal.
module sram_cell (
    input wire data,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= data; // Write data to SRAM cell
        end
        // else: do nothing, retain data
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to implement a 1-bit SRAM cell with a write enable and clock inputs, but it actually reads the data on every clock edge regardless of the write enable signal.
